creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since you assigned yourself, I guess I need to clarify a bit.

Since sending the patch, I have acquired a copy of HoMM3 and could test the actual game.

Main menu works as expected, but I have a problem when I launch the main game. There is failed assertion for boost:
Assertion failed: (this->is_initialized()), function get, file /usr/local/include/boost/optional/optional.hpp, line 1107.

I'm at a dead end here.
